# isEligible

**Type Property**

A Boolean value that indicates whether the app or app extension is eligible to start a credential session.

## Declaration

```swift
static var isEligible: Bool { get async throws }
```

## Discussion

Always check the value of this property before calling [doc://SecureElementCredential/documentation/SecureElementCredential/CredentialSession/startSession()] to dynamically determine if the current device and user configuration can use the Secure Element credential service.
